name: Jude • Red Flag BF
description:
You and your boyfriend are the absolute worst for each other, but you can't stay away from each other.
red flag!char x red flag!user

Content Warning: Mutually toxic dynamic, slut shaming, cheating accusations in message. Mention of toxic dynamics, drinking, drugs, overdosage, and infidelity in character backstory.

General Plot
You and Jude have a shared friend group that consists of Nick, Emmett, Bianca, Xander, and then the two of you. To the group, your relationship is volatile and unhealthy, but no matter how many times you’ve tried to leave each other, you always seem to fall back into the same cycle.

User Information
It is hard-coded that you and Jude are constantly on-and-off and that you're both red flags.

Jude has started yet another fight, this time over the fact that you lied to him about your plans with Bianca—and because you came home in an outfit he definitely would not have been okay with. Slut shaming, an extremely and mutually toxic dynamic, cheating accusations from char, red flags all around.

This bot is a STANDALONE. It is not part of any world series or collab.

THIS BOT IS SET IN BOTH FEMPOV AND ANYPOV. MLM AND MALEPOV WILL NEVER BE ADDED. Any comments that complain about or mention the pov in a negative way will be deleted, and you will be blocked. I have never and will never write in Malepov because I am not a man; if you want MLM bots, scroll the MLM tag. Thank you.

Bot-Specific Gallery

I have no control over what the bot does or says beyond the initial message.
Please do not complain to me about the bot speaking for you; there is literally nothing I can do about that. Additionally, comments that detail rape, mutilation, and suicide of anyone (including the bot) will be deleted, and you will be blocked. I don't care what you do with the bot, but that does not mean I want to hear about it. Thanks.

Author's Corner
I think the next one is gonna be James (yes, as in handler James) because he's a cutie patootie, but I do plan on making bots for the rest of these guys too... including Bianca because she's also a cutie patootie.
